sql_array: CREATE TABLE employees (id UInt32, name String, department String, salary UInt32) ENGINE = Memory;
UPDATE employees SET salary = salary * 1.1 WHERE department = 'Engineering';
SELECT name, salary, first_value(name) OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary DESC) AS highest_paid_in_department FROM employees;
SELECT department, first_value(salary) OVER (PARTITION BY department ORDER BY salary ASC) AS lowest_salary FROM employees;
